steps.title: Identify the key location descriptor
steps.content: The passage establishes that manul cats live in “out-of-the-way parts of Asia,” which is the decisive clue about the nature of their habitats.

steps.title: Apply the descriptor to find the answer
steps.content: "Distant from" large populations describes habitats far from human settlements, explaining why the cats are difficult to research. The other options either contradict this remote-location clue or do not fit the sentence's logic. That is the correct answer.
